summary: Tested WhatsApp Message History/Log (Berichten) tab feature in Vastgoed Kiosk ERP admin dashboard. All backend APIs and frontend UI components working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used existing 8 demo WhatsApp messages in kiosk_wa_messages collection
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp Message History feature fully tested. The Berichten tab is accessible from admin dashboard after login (demo@facturatie.sr / demo2024) and clicking Beheerder button. Key test-ids: messages-tab, messages-search, messages-filter-type, messages-filter-status, messages-refresh, message-row-{id}

backend_apis.notes: Returns array of messages with correct fields (message_id, company_id, tenant_id, tenant_name, phone, message_type, message, status, created_at)

frontend_ui.notes: Login at /vastgoed with demo credentials works
Button visible at bottom-left after login, navigates to admin dashboard
Tab visible in navigation bar with MessageSquare icon
Shows 8 message rows with tenant name, phone, date, type badge, status badge
Searching 'Bharat' shows only 2 messages for that tenant
Clicking row expands to show full message text
Vernieuwen button reloads messages from API
